final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a park scene viewed from slightly left of center, showing a man in a light blue button-up shirt and khaki pants standing next to a golden retriever seated on the grass. The man is positioned slightly left of center, with the dog to his right. The ground is covered in snow, transforming the vibrant green grass into a white, textured surface. In the mid-ground, two wooden park benches are visible — one on the left side of the frame and one on the right — both now blanketed in snow. Leafy trees stand behind the benches, their branches dusted with snow. In the background, a body of water stretches across the horizon, with a faint city skyline visible under a cloudy, overcast sky. The overall lighting is cool and diffused, typical of a snowy day, casting soft shadows. Many people are scattered throughout the scene, walking along the paths, sitting on the snow-covered benches, and interacting in small groups, creating a lively and bustling atmosphere. The camera perspective remains eye-level, capturing the full expanse of the park from left to right, with the man and dog as the central focus. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level shot, facing slightly right towards the subject; Foreground: man standing center-left, golden retriever seated to his right on vibrant green grass; Background: two wooden park benches on the left and right sides of the frame, with leafy trees behind them. A body of water and city skyline are visible in the far distance under a cloudy, overcast sky; Spatial layout: man and dog occupy the central foreground; benches flank the mid-ground; trees and skyline form the background; Dominant color palette: bright greens from grass, light blue from the sky, warm tones from the man's clothing and dog's fur. Style reference: Background: two wooden park benches on the left and right sides of the frame, with leafy trees behind them. A body of water and city skyline are visible in the far distance under a cloudy, overcast sky; Dominant color palette: bright greens from grass, light blue from the sky, warm tones from the man's clothing and dog's fur; Surface materials: smooth grass, wooden texture of benches, glossy fur on the dog, matte fabric of the man's shirt; Atmosphere: serene, open outdoor space with a cool, diffused light typical of a snowy day.

reasoning_chain: Step 1: The image shows a sunny day in a park with a man and his golden retriever on green grass. Key elements include the clear blue sky, trees, benches, and distant water/cityscape.
Step 2: The instruction asks to imagine the scene if it were snowy and crowded with people, implying a transformation of weather and human presence.

Step 3: The expected visual outcome includes snow covering the ground, many people populating the park, while the original subjects (man, dog, trees, benches) remain visible but altered by the new conditions.
instruction: 如果公园里人很多，地面被雪覆盖会怎样？
visual_cues: Camera viewpoint: eye-level shot, facing slightly right towards the subject.
Foreground: man standing center-left, golden retriever seated to his right on vibrant green grass.
Background: two wooden park benches on the left and right sides of the frame, with leafy trees behind them. A body of water and city skyline are visible in the far distance under a bright blue sky.
Spatial layout: man and dog occupy the central foreground; benches flank the mid-ground; trees and skyline form the background.
Dominant color palette: bright greens from grass, light blue from the sky, warm tones from the man's clothing and dog's fur.
Lighting: natural daylight, strong sunlight casting soft shadows on the grass.
Surface materials: smooth grass, wooden texture of benches, glossy fur on the dog, matte fabric of the man's shirt.
Atmosphere: serene, sunny, open outdoor space.
physics_implications: Snow will accumulate on all horizontal surfaces (grass, benches), changing their texture to white and fluffy. Shadows will be softer due to diffused light from an overcast sky. The man and dog will appear cooler, possibly wearing winter clothes.
The addition of many people will alter the spatial dynamics, filling the benches and walking paths, creating a bustling atmosphere.
preserve_objects: Overall spatial composition (camera angle, relative positions)
